query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS founding_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT,
  houseId VARCHAR(100),
  fullName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  foundingDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  foundingRole ENUM('primary_founder', 'co_founder', 'charter_member', 'founding_investor') NOT NULL,
  entityId VARCHAR(100),
  entityName VARCHAR(255),
  heirEducationBenefit BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  benefitGenerations INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  verificationStatus ENUM('verified', 'pending', 'disputed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'verified',
  verifiedBy VARCHAR(255),
  verifiedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'deceased', 'inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS heir_education_benefits (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  heirUserId INT,
  heirHouseId VARCHAR(100),
  heirFullName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  foundingMemberId INT NOT NULL,
  generationFromFounder INT NOT NULL,
  lineagePath TEXT,
  benefitType ENUM('full_tuition', 'partial_tuition', 'materials_only', 'priority_enrollment') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'full_tuition',
  coveragePercentage INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  academyEnrollmentId INT,
  enrollmentDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expectedGraduation TIMESTAMP NULL,
  tuitionValue DECIMAL(10,2),
  totalBenefitUsed DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('eligible', 'enrolled', 'graduated', 'expired', 'revoked') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'eligible',
  lineageVerified BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  verifiedBy VARCHAR(255),
  verifiedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scholarship_programs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  scholarshipType ENUM('merit_based', 'need_based', 'community_service', 'entrepreneurship', 'legacy', 'diversity', 'stem', 'arts', 'full_ride') NOT NULL,
  coverageType ENUM('full_tuition', 'partial_tuition', 'stipend', 'materials', 'comprehensive') NOT NULL,
  coverageAmount DECIMAL(10,2),
  coveragePercentage INT,
  minAge INT,
  maxAge INT,
  minGPA DECIMAL(3,2),
  requiredCommunityHours INT,
  incomeThreshold DECIMAL(10,2),
  eligibilityCriteria JSON,
  applicationStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  applicationEndDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  awardDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalSlots INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  filledSlots INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  waitlistEnabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  fundingSource VARCHAR(255),
  totalBudget DECIMAL(12,2),
  remainingBudget DECIMAL(12,2),
  renewable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  maxRenewalYears INT DEFAULT 4,
  renewalCriteria TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'active', 'closed', 'suspended', 'archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scholarship_applications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  applicantUserId INT,
  applicantFullName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  applicantEmail VARCHAR(320),
  applicantPhone VARCHAR(20),
  applicantAddress TEXT,
  dateOfBirth TIMESTAMP NULL,
  scholarshipProgramId INT NOT NULL,
  currentEducationLevel ENUM('middle_school', 'high_school', 'ged_program', 'community_college', 'university', 'graduate_school', 'academy_enrolled', 'other'),
  schoolName VARCHAR(255),
  gpa DECIMAL(3,2),
  expectedGraduation TIMESTAMP NULL,
  householdIncome DECIMAL(10,2),
  householdSize INT,
  financialNeedStatement TEXT,
  communityServiceHours INT,
  communityServiceDescription TEXT,
  personalStatement TEXT,
  goalsStatement TEXT,
  transcriptUrl VARCHAR(2000),
  recommendationLetters JSON,
  additionalDocuments JSON,
  academicScore INT,
  needScore INT,
  serviceScore INT,
  essayScore INT,
  totalScore INT,
  reviewStatus ENUM('submitted', 'under_review', 'committee_review', 'approved', 'denied', 'waitlisted', 'withdrawn') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'submitted',
  reviewedBy VARCHAR(255),
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  reviewNotes TEXT,
  awardAmount DECIMAL(10,2),
  awardedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  awardLetter TEXT,
  acceptedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  declinedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  declineReason TEXT,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scholarship_fund (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  fundType ENUM('general', 'endowment', 'annual', 'memorial', 'corporate', 'community') NOT NULL,
  principalBalance DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  availableBalance DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  committedBalance DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  isEndowed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  endowmentMinimum DECIMAL(12,2),
  annualSpendingRate DECIMAL(5,4),
  linkedProgramIds JSON,
  status ENUM('active', 'building', 'suspended', 'closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scholarship_fund_transactions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fundId INT NOT NULL,
  transactionType ENUM('donation', 'grant_deposit', 'interest_earned', 'award_disbursement', 'transfer_in', 'transfer_out', 'fee', 'adjustment') NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  donorName VARCHAR(255),
  donorId INT,
  applicationId INT,
  programId INT,
  description TEXT,
  referenceNumber VARCHAR(100),
  balanceAfter DECIMAL(12,2),
  processedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  processedBy VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
